tasks.label: Deploy LRA Full
tasks.command: net stop W3SVC & net stop WAS & sc config W3SVC start= disabled & net localgroup docker-users Administrator /add & echo {"hosts": ["npipe://", "tcp://127.0.0.1:2375"]} > C:\ProgramData\docker\config\daemon.json & net stop docker & net start docker & timeout /t 5 & docker-compose pull --ignore-buildable & docker-compose build --no-cache & docker-compose up -d db redis & timeout /t 15 & docker-compose run --rm backend alembic upgrade head & docker-compose up -d
